description: Configure DNS records for Branch AI-powered email support. Adds SPF, DKIM, and MX records required by Resend for sending and receiving email on your domain.
variableDescription: %spfhost%: SPF/MX subdomain (e.g. send). %spfvalue%: SPF mechanisms only — without v=spf1 prefix or trailing all rule (e.g. include:amazonses.com). %mxvalue%: MX endpoint. %dkim1name%: DKIM key 1 selector (e.g. r2). %dkim1value%: DKIM key 1 CNAME target. %dkim2name%: DKIM key 2 selector (e.g. r3). %dkim2value%: DKIM key 2 CNAME target. %dkim3name%: DKIM key 3 selector (e.g. r4). %dkim3value%: DKIM key 3 CNAME target.
